info.title: Rewrite API
info.summary: Projects API reference (Projects, API Keys, Templates, Webhooks).
info.description:
Complete public reference for project-level endpoints in Rewrite API v1.

All endpoints return a consistent envelope (`ok`, `data`, and optional `cursor`).
Use either bearer token (API key) with scopes or authenticated cookie session.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Register and manage delivery event webhooks.

get.description:
Lists webhook endpoints configured for this project.

Use `limit`, `after`, and `before` for pagination.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

webhooks = client.webhooks.list({"limit": 20})

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$webhooks = $rewrite->webhooks->list([
  'limit' => 20,
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

webhooks = rewrite.webhooks.list(limit: 20)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
Swift
C#

post.description: Creates a webhook endpoint and event subscriptions.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$webhook = $rewrite->webhooks->create([
  'name' => 'Delivery events',
  'endpoint' => 'https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite',
  'events' => ['sms.queued', 'sms.delivered', 'sms.failed'],
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

webhook = rewrite.webhooks.create(
  name: "Delivery events",
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite",
  events: ["sms.queued", "sms.delivered", "sms.failed"]
)

x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = client.webhooks.get(webhook_id)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$webhookId = '748395130237498700';

$webhook = $rewrite->webhooks->get($webhookId);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = rewrite.webhooks.get(webhook_id)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val webhookId = "748395130237498700"

  val webhook = rewrite.webhooks.get(webhookId)

  println(webhook)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
C#

patch.description: Updates webhook endpoint, events, name or status.

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Go
Python
x-codeSamples.source:
from rewrite import Client, WebhookEventType, WebhookStatus

client = Client("rw_your_api_key")

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = client.webhooks.update(
    webhook_id,
    {
        "endpoint": "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
        "events": [
            WebhookEventType.SMS_DELIVERED,
            WebhookEventType.SMS_FAILED,
        ],
        "status": WebhookStatus.ACTIVE,
    }
)

x-codeSamples.label: Java
PHP
x-codeSamples.source:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/vendor/autoload.php';

use RewriteToday\Rewrite;

$rewrite = new Rewrite(getenv('REWRITE_API_KEY'));

$webhookId = '748395130237498700';

$webhook = $rewrite->webhooks->update($webhookId, [
  'endpoint' => 'https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2',
  'events' => ['sms.delivered', 'sms.failed'],
  'status' => 'ACTIVE',
]);

x-codeSamples.label: Ruby
x-codeSamples.source:
require "rewrite"

rewrite = Rewrite::Client.new(api_key: ENV.fetch("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

webhook_id = "748395130237498700"

webhook = rewrite.webhooks.update(
  webhook_id,
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
  events: ["sms.delivered", "sms.failed"],
  status: "ACTIVE"
)

x-codeSamples.label: Kotlin
x-codeSamples.source:
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.Rewrite
import com.rewritetoday.sdk.models.webhooks.UpdateWebhookOptions

fun main() {
  val rewrite = Rewrite(System.getenv("REWRITE_API_KEY"))

  val webhookId = "748395130237498700"

  val webhook = rewrite.webhooks.update(
    webhookId,
    UpdateWebhookOptions(
      endpoint = "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
      events = listOf("sms.delivered", "sms.failed"),
      status = "ACTIVE"
    )
  )

  println(webhook)
}

x-codeSamples.label: Swift
x-codeSamples.source:
import Foundation
import RewriteSDK

let rewrite = Rewrite(apiKey: ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment["REWRITE_API_KEY"] ?? "")

let webhookId = "748395130237498700"

let webhook = try await rewrite.webhooks.update(
  webhookId,
  endpoint: "https://example.com/webhooks/rewrite-v2",
  events: ["sms.delivered", "sms.failed"],
  status: "ACTIVE"
)

print(webhook)

bearerAuth.description: Send your API key as `Authorization: Bearer <api-key>`.

after.name: after
after.description: Unique cursor ID to fetch items after this value.

before.name: before
before.description: Unique cursor ID to fetch items before this value.

persist.description: Whether another page can be requested using `next`.

next.description: Cursor to request the next page (`after`).

ok.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

data.description: No data is returned for this response.

OkEmptyResponse.description: Successful response. This endpoint does not return any data.

name.description: Human-readable name used to identify this API key.

ok.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

data.description: Primary response payload for this operation.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor information for fetching the next page.

ok.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

data.description: Primary response payload for this operation.

name.description: Human-readable name used to identify this API key.

WebhookCreateBody.description: Create a webhook to receive SMS events.

name.description: Human-readable name used to identify this API key.

WebhookUpdateBody.description: Update webhook endpoint, subscribed events, name or status.

ok.description: Indicates whether the request was successful.

data.description: Primary response payload for this operation.
